examples: The trend has continued with a succession of experts and would be experts who promise to distil the essence of excellence into three (or five or seven) simple rules.
The writer managed to distil his ideas into one succinct article.
Instead they distil the Palestinian experience of exile into something real.
Interviewed in a television studio, they were taught to distil complex research ideas into fifteen second snapshots for public consumption.
Distil protects sites against automatic content scraping bots by observing site behavior and identifying patterns peculiar to scrapers.
